title: Tahir b. al-Husayn 's epistle of advice to his son 'Abdallah on the latter's taking up his post
description: Tahir b. al-Husayn 's epistle of advice to his son 'Abdallah on the latter's taking up his post. Recorded under the year 206 AH (c. 821 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
